name: German Cabbage Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Tie the 6 sprigs of parsley and 1 bay leaf together with a thread.
2. In a 6-quart saucepan or pot, combine all ingredients except salt, pepper, and cheese.
3. Simmer partially covered for 1 to 2 hours.
4. Discard the parsley bundle; season to taste.
5. Pour into hot soup plates and garnish with cheese.
